name: Wired Gambit
short_description: Cut wires and outsmart Smuggy in the high stakes game of Wired Gambit. Strategically use your items, manage your shields, and choose your cuts carefully to emerge victorious!
detailed_description:
In Wired Gambit, you and Smuggy take turns cutting wires on a bomb. Only one wire triggers the explosion, and your goal is to avoid it. Use your items to gain shields, test wires, double the bomb's damage, skip turns, or even cut a wire let Smuggy face the consequences!

Outsmart Smuggy with cunning tactics and manage your resources to survive this high-stakes challenge!

The game features a basic Standard Mode, which unlocks 8 Challenge Modes and an Endless Mode upon first completion.

In Endless Mode, complete as many rounds as possible, but beware—if you don't claim your score and end up perishing, it will be lost!
Every new round is a chance to either increase your score, or lose it all!
